options.name: <base_collection>
options.description: Collection of objects from which to filter objects for the new collection

options.name: <filter_expression>
options.description: Criteria with which to filter objects

options.name: -nocase
options.description: Specifies that pattern matching is not case sensitive.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Suppresses all error and warning messages generated when the filter_collection command is run

options.name: -regexp
options.description: Treats the specified patterns as regular expression patterns.
